sections.title: Before Shades of Mort'ton as an afflicted
Using a serum 207 on him before making one in the quest

lines.speaker: Ulsquire Shauncy
lines.text: The serum it works...but it's not too fresh, make some yourself and then it might work for longer.

lines.speaker: Ulsquire Shauncy
lines.text: Ah, hello again, what can I do for you now?

lines.speaker: Ulsquire Shauncy
lines.text: Hello again! Many thanks for helping us to solve the riddle with the Shades, we can start to work now putting all those Shade spirits to rest and get a little bit of a reward to go along with it!

lines.speaker: Ulsquire Shauncy
lines.text: You've already used the permanent serum on me, you don't need to use that any more.

lines.speaker: Ulsquire Shauncy
lines.text: Well done...I feel this serum is really working on me. I think you've cracked it my friend! I'd like to give you something for your trouble!
